text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day has finally arrived. Maruzensky and Grass
Wonder will race against each other in the
Yasuda Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely! Grass may be a cute, younger athlete,
but her running ability is ferocious.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Opponents like that make for a fun race,
though!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I'm going to enjoy bringing home the win!
